title: Add Wave 31 manager assignment center regression matrix
description: Extend QA coverage for the manager assignment center so queue list, detail, action evidence, and auth/session guardrails remain deterministic while protecting dashboard, handoff, and provider directory baselines.
acceptance_criteria: QA strategy documents Wave 31 assignment center coverage and ticket mapping
Regression matrix asserts queue list/detail/action contract when Wave 31 endpoints are available
Guardrail tests preserve unauthorized, forbidden, and baseline manager parity behavior
